arts.ttl: Why David Brooks Wasn't Sent Off During Chelsea vs Bournemouth
arts.sum: Brooks collided with Marc Cucurella off the ball - but was allowed to stay on the pitch after a length VAR review.

arts.ttl: Man City kickstart rebuild as club agree £30m deal to sign Vitor Reis
arts.sum: Premier League champions also working on move to sign Abdukodir Khusanov

arts.ttl: Manchester City agree deal in principle for Palmeiras teenager Vitor Reis
arts.sum: City are also looking to bring in Lens defender Abdukodir Khusanov and have been linked with Eintracht Frankfurt striker Omar Marmoush.

arts.ttl: Manchester City agree deal to buy defender Vitor Reis from Palmeiras
arts.sum: Brazilian teenager set to join for about £30m City also working to buy Khusanov from Lens Manchester City are closing in on the signing of the Palmeiras centre-back Vitor Reis with an agreement in principle understood to have been reached. The 19-year-old Brazilian looks set to join the Premier League champions for about £30m. City are working to bring in another central defender in Lens’s Uzbekistan international Abdukodir Khusanov after a considerable slump in results. They won only once in 13 games as 2024 drew to a close and lie sixth in the league table before Tuesday’s trip to Brentford. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Vitor Reis made key request about Manchester City move that Palmeiras have now accepted
arts.sum: TBR Football can exclusively reveal that Manchester City have finalised an agreement with Palmeiras to sign Vitor Reis. City have been working hard to bolster...

arts.ttl: Man City agree £29.4m deal to sign Palmeiras defender Vitor Reis... with the Brazilian set to be one of THREE signings this month
arts.sum: : The Brazilian defender will link up with Pep Guardiola's side immediately rather than stay in Brazil for the Club World Cup.
